## 兼容性与安全 / Compatibility and security

## 验证 / Validation

- [ ] `make ci`
- [ ] 规范行为变化时已同步中英文规范、Schema、canonical YAML 与 Conformance 要求
- [ ] 可移植行为变化时已更新中英文文档与 Schema / Bilingual docs and schemas updated
- [ ] 未引入 secret、exporter-local path 或 implicit execution path / No unsafe state introduced
